name: Cream of Artichoke Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sliced leeks, white part only
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the leeks and cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until softened.
3. Add the artichoke hearts and continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
4. Stir in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat and let it simmer for 30-35 minutes.
6. Remove from the heat and purée the soup using a food processor or hand blender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Return the puréed soup to the saucepan and stir in the cream, heating just until warmed through.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese before serving hot.
